who: billing clerks at small law firms processing 5–15 invoices/month
offer: For billing clerks at small law firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient manual billing causes delays in payment collection. We automate the conversion of legal time logs into formatted billing submissions instead of manual entry of time logs into billing software.
problem: Inefficient manual billing processes lead to errors and delays.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for billing clerks
Share insights on Indie Hackers forums
Direct message billing clerks with demo video
Engage in community groups for billing clerks
try_it: Let users try manual entry of time logs and templates
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a demo video of manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
